mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.order_id AS orderId, l.order_no AS orderNo, l.operator_id AS operatorId, u.username AS operatorName, l.action, l.old_status AS oldStatus, l.new_status AS newStatus, l.remark, l.created_at AS createdAt FROM t_work_order_log l LEFT JOIN t_user u ON l.operator_id = u.id WHERE l.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY l.created_at ASC
